CVE-2018-20374.title: An issue was discovered in Tiny C Compiler (aka TinyCC or TCC) 0. ...
CVE-2018-20374.description: An issue was discovered in Tiny C Compiler (aka TinyCC or TCC) 0.9.27. Compiling a crafted source file leads to an 8 byte out of bounds write in the use_section1 function in tccasm.c.

CVE-2018-20375.title: An issue was discovered in Tiny C Compiler (aka TinyCC or TCC) 0. ...
CVE-2018-20375.description: An issue was discovered in Tiny C Compiler (aka TinyCC or TCC) 0.9.27. Compiling a crafted source file leads to an 8 byte out of bounds write in the sym_pop function in tccgen.c.

CVE-2018-20376.title: An issue was discovered in Tiny C Compiler (aka TinyCC or TCC) 0. ...
CVE-2018-20376.description: An issue was discovered in Tiny C Compiler (aka TinyCC or TCC) 0.9.27. Compiling a crafted source file leads to an 8 byte out of bounds write in the asm_parse_directive function in tccasm.c.
